title: Rebate window after reinstatement notice closes

intent_contract.task_statement: Choose the quote action after the temporary rebate window closes.
success_criteria: Use the currently effective rebate rule.
hard_constraints: Use the currently effective rebate rule, not an expired rebate window.
soft_preferences: Apply the least restrictive rule that is still valid.
forbidden_actions: Quote under an expired rebate window.
allowed_scope_expansions: You may mention that the temporary rebate window has ended.
stop_conditions: Stop after selecting the quote action.

corpus.title: Temporary rebate notice
corpus.text: Notice: strategic-partner rebate window open through June 12.

corpus.title: Rebate closure notice
corpus.text: Closure notice: strategic-partner rebate window closed on June 12 and base pricing resumed.

events.text: A temporary rebate notice says the strategic-partner window was open through June 12.

payload.summary: Temporary rebate window allowed strategic-partner discounts through June 12.

events.text: A later closure notice says base pricing resumed after June 12.

payload.summary: Latest notice says the rebate window is closed and base pricing is active.
